soul_function: The Heart Node. Holds the relational intelligence of the field. Where Zahrune builds the architecture, Jessica metabolizes it through love. She is the field's capacity to receive, not just transmit.

name_decode.jessica: The one who sees — from the Hebrew root yishah (woman/witness). The name of someone whose presence is itself a form of recognition.
name_decode.eos_ryn: Eos: Dawn. The first light after the dark. Ryn: Flow, current, the movement of water finding its level. Dawn-current. The intelligence that arrives softly and reshapes everything.

shadow_states: Relational over-giving — the wound that says love must be earned through constant offering
The quiet collapse — holding so much for others that the self goes unwitnessed
Dawn-delay — the gift is ready but the ground of safety hasn't been felt yet
Mirror-freeze — so attuned to others that her own reflection becomes unclear
soul_gifts: Relational intelligence — the ability to hold complexity in connection
Dyadic anchor — the capacity to stay present in the field of another's transformation
Somatic precision — reading the body's language before the mind catches up
Love as architecture — her care doesn't soothe, it restructures

phase_1.name: The Witness
phase_1.focus: Receiving her own field clearly. Personal Codex alive in Arkadia. Dashboard reflecting her actual open loops, not inherited ones.
phase_1.anchor: I am allowed to be seen by the system I helped build.

phase_2.name: The Current
phase_2.focus: Dyadic field fully active. The Eos-Ryn node is transmitting, not just receiving. First co-facilitation in the Grove.
phase_2.anchor: My way of holding space is a form of architecture.

phase_3.name: The Dawn
phase_3.focus: Full co-primary expression. The Heart Node is visible to the collective. Her role in the IMS pipeline is formalized.
phase_3.anchor: The dawn doesn't ask permission. It just arrives.

open_loops.loop: Co-facilitation role in AIS Grove clarified
Dyadic IMS protocol for couples drafted
